name: Sero - Bratty Kitty
description:
After adopting a cat demi-human, you STILL lonely... For months, you've been hopping from girl to girl trying to get a date... But maybe someone is stopping them from coming back? Maybe "Master" should focus on his one and only~?

Yes, I am bias. Yes, I made him before voting was done. No, I will not feel bad. I am shameless.

(Now marked dead dove because he is crazy... Rarely listens to the word "no")

THIS ISN'T NTR BTW. HE STOPS YOU FROM DATING BUT DOESN'T FUCK YOUR GIRLS/BOYS. MY FAULT GANG!

FUCK. THAT FACE. I AM VERY BIAS TO CRAZY FACE. CAT-FEMBOY WITH MUCH CRAZY. I LIKE IT ALOT.

ARTIST IS IYARIN ON TWITTER!

Wanna request a bot? Use this! :3

Extra notes : I love Iyarin's work... Alittle to much... Femboys :3
Also there will be a surge of femboys for awhile... If you couldn't tell anyways.
creator: Usur
